name: event_id
description: UUID v4 from producer — used for deduplication in Dataflow

name: event_timestamp
description: Event time (UTC) — Beam event time for windowing

name: event_date
description: Partition key — derived from event_timestamp in Dataflow

name: properties
description: Raw properties map as JSON string

name: ingested_at
description: Dataflow write timestamp — processing time, not event time

name: dataflow_job_id
description: Dataflow job ID for lineage tracing
